prompt: A cinematic fantasy poster in the style of an epic medieval throne-room drama, showing a modern woman seated confidently on a dark iron sword throne. She is centered in a full-body portrait, sitting with one leg crossed over the other and both arms resting casually on the throne arms, projecting relaxed queenly confidence. She has long, wavy {argument name="hair color" default="blonde"} hair falling over her shoulders, and wears contemporary casual clothing instead of period costume: a fitted long-sleeve {argument name="top color" default="deep burgundy"} shirt, dark blue skinny jeans, and black ankle boots. The throne is massive, jagged, and forged from overlapping weathered swords, filling most of the background. The setting is a dim, moody royal hall with warm firelight, soft glowing candles, faint sparks or embers in the air, and two vertical banners in the distant background bearing a red three-headed dragon-style sigil. Use dramatic, high-contrast lighting, rich dark metallic textures, warm orange highlights, and a polished premium fantasy-poster look. Add faint handwritten-style text near the upper left arc of the throne reading {argument name="name text" default="LAREENA STARKER"}. At the bottom, add large ornate metallic-gold title typography in a fantasy serif style reading {argument name="main title" default="BABE"} on the first line, smaller centered "OF" below it, and {argument name="subtitle" default="THRONES"} in very large letters across the bottom, with the O stylized as a circular emblem with vertical bars. Vertical poster composition, symmetrical framing, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, regal but playful modern parody of an iconic fantasy throne poster.
translatedPrompt: 一张史诗级中世纪王座厅剧风格的电影感奇幻海报，展示了一位现代女性自信地坐在黑暗的铁剑王座上。她位于全身肖像的中心，双腿交叠，双臂随意地搭在王座扶手上，展现出一种轻松而女王范儿的自信。她留着长长的波浪卷发，{argument name="hair color" default="金色"} 发丝垂在肩头，身穿现代休闲装而非古装：一件修身长袖 {argument name="top color" default="深酒红色"} 上衣、深蓝色紧身牛仔裤和黑色短靴。王座巨大且参差不齐，由重叠的风化剑刃锻造而成，占据了大部分背景。场景设定在一个昏暗、忧郁的皇家大厅中，伴有温暖的烛光、柔和的烛火、空气中漂浮的微弱火星或余烬，背景远处悬挂着两面带有红色三头龙纹章的垂直旗帜。采用戏剧性的高对比度照明、丰富的深色金属质感、温暖的橙色高光，呈现出精致的高级奇幻海报质感。在王座左上方的弧形区域附近添加模糊的手写风格文字，内容为 {argument name="name text" default="LAREENA STARKER"}。在底部，添加醒目且华丽的金属金色奇幻衬线字体标题，第一行显示 {argument name="main title" default="BABE"}，下方居中显示较小的“OF”，最底部以超大字体显示 {argument name="subtitle" default="THRONES"}，其中“O”字母被设计为带有垂直条纹的圆形徽章。竖版海报构图，对称式框架，超精细，照片级真实感，是对标志性奇幻王座海报的华丽而俏皮的现代恶搞。

breakdown.creativeCore: 现代女王铁王座海报：一张充满戏剧性的奇幻恶搞海报，描绘了一位现代女性在剑之王座上从容统治的场景，非常适合用于个性化的史诗角色肖像和社交媒体模因。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, symmetrical, full-body, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
